结节病.summary: 肺结节病可进展为肺纤维化、气道病变和肺动脉高压，需阶梯式治疗，甲氨蝶呤可替代泼尼松作为一线方案。

结节病.title: Sarcoidosis on 18 F-FDG PET/CT : Typical and Atypical Imaging Patterns.

结节病.summary: 18F-FDG PET/CT能识别结节病的典型与非典型多系统受累模式。

结节病.summary: 肉状瘤病患者接种流感疫苗后，血清转化率高于健康对照组，且安全性良好。

结节病.title: Coexistence of sarcoidosis and spondyloarthritis: a rare but intriguing association.

结节病.title: Ectopic co-expression of canonical and LINE1 and THE1A-exonizing IL23R transcripts in sarcoid myopathy.
结节病.authors: Iida A, Funaguma S, Nishino I
结节病.summary: 类肉瘤肌病中IL23R异常转录本共表达，可能与该病易感性相关。

ILD.title: Izalontamab brengitecan (Iza-bren; BL-B01D1), a first-in-class EGFR-HER3 bispecific antibody-drug conjugate, for patients with EGFR-mutated NSCLC: pooled analysis of phase I and phase II trials.

ILD.summary: 伊扎仑妥单抗-贝兰妥单抗对EGFR突变NSCLC经治患者有47.4%客观缓解率。

ILD.title: Rheumatoid arthritis contributes to comorbidity burden through systemic inflammation and autoimmunity: examples of atherosclerotic cardiovascular disease, interstitial lung disease, and depression.
ILD.authors: Beaule MY, Getachew LS, Sparks JA
ILD.summary: 类风湿关节炎通过全身炎症和自身免疫增加动脉粥样硬化、间质性肺病和抑郁等共病风险。

ILD.title: Extracorporeal membrane oxygenation for idiopathic inflammatory myopathy-associated interstitial lung disease: a narrative review.
ILD.authors: Wang Z, Yin C, Gao X, Xu L
ILD.summary: ECMO可作为特发性炎性肌病相关间质性肺病伴严重呼吸衰竭患者通往肺移植的桥梁，生存率显著更高。

ILD.title: Using Genetic Risk Scores for Rheumatoid Arthritis-Associated Interstitial Lung Disease Risk Stratification.
ILD.authors: McDermott GC, Sparks JA
ILD.summary: 摘要缺失。

ILD.title: Early risk response to vasodilators and outcomes in interstitial lung disease associated pulmonary hypertension.

ILD.title: Optimizing Personalized Care Through Multidisciplinary Management in Rheumatoid Arthritis-Associated Interstitial Lung Disease: A Narrative Review.
ILD.authors: Markovic M, Lepri G, Matucci Cerinic M, Guiducci S
ILD.summary: 多学科管理可为类风湿关节炎相关间质性肺病提供个体化诊治框架，但真实证据有限。

ILD.summary: 系统性硬化症中心血管受累常见且多亚临床，需通过免疫血管机制进行早期风险分层。

ILD.title: Childhood Interstitial Lung Disease-Successful Application of a Stepwise Diagnostic Classification.
ILD.authors: Rapp CK, Griese M
ILD.summary: 该三步诊断分类法将儿童间质性肺病有效分为暴露相关、系统疾病和遗传病因三类，遗传诊断率达50.8%。

ILD.title: Risk of interstitial lung disease following COVID-19 infection in patients with autoimmune diseases: a retrospective cohort study.

ILD.summary: 自身免疫病患者感染新冠后，间质性肺病风险显著增加（HR=1.23）。

ILD.title: Think globally, act locally: inhalational exposure questionnaires in interstitial lung disease.
ILD.authors: Douglas D, Lee CT
ILD.summary: 摘要缺失。

ILD.authors: Marchi G, Fanni SC, Mercier M, Cefalo J, Salerni C, Ferioli M, Candoli P, Romei C, Gori L, Cucchiara F, Cenerini G, Guglielmi G, Pistelli F, Carrozzi L, Mondoni M

ILD.title: Development of a translational murine model for antibody-drug conjugate-induced interstitial lung disease.

ILD.title: Inflammatory Biomarkers and Outcome Heterogeneity in Anti-MDA5 Antibody-Associated Interstitial Lung Disease: A Single-Center Consecutive Cohort Study.

ILD.title: Pathophysiological and Molecular Features of DXd ADC-Related Interstitial Pneumonitis in Cynomolgus Monkeys.
ILD.authors: Kumagai K, Iguchi T, Kubota K, Sakurai K, Tsuchiya Y, Chiba K
ILD.summary: DXd ADC在食蟹猴中诱导间质性肺炎，BALF细胞外囊泡蛋白组和肺单细胞转录组关联分析揭示了炎症和修复通路。
